function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a location. This function queries the weather service API and returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and other meteorological data for the specified location. It supports both city name and coordinates-based lookups.

location.description: The city name or coordinates to get weather for. This can be either a city name like 'Beijing' or 'San Francisco', or coordinates in 'lat,lng' format like '39.9,116.4'.

units.description: The unit system to use for temperature. Defaults to celsius.
